items.title_en: Newcastle, Liverpool and England legend Keegan dies
items.title_zh: 纽卡斯尔、利物浦和英格兰传奇人物基冈去世
items.desc_en: Former England captain and manager Kevin Keegan dies at the age of 75, seven weeks after he revealed he had been diagnosed with stage four cancer.
items.desc_zh: 前英格兰队队长兼主教练凯文·基冈在透露自己被诊断出患有第四期癌症七周后去世，享年 75 岁。

items.title_en: Two injured after man with airsoft rifles lit fireworks outside NYC immigration court: MS NOW
items.title_zh: 男子用气枪步枪在纽约移民法院外点燃烟花，造成两人受伤：MS NOW
items.desc_en: The FBI told CNBC that an individual set off "an incendiary device" outside 26 Federal Plaza, which contains a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement office.
items.desc_zh: FBI 告诉 CNBC，有人在联邦广场 26 号外引爆了“燃烧装置”，该广场设有美国移民和海关执法办公室。

items.title_en: Alphabet stock pops on report it's developing a more efficient AI chip
items.title_zh: Alphabet 股票因正在开发更高效的人工智能芯片而上涨
items.desc_en: The new AI chip, called "Frozen v2," would embed parts of Gemini's architecture directly into the silicon, according to the report.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，这款名为“Frozen v2”的新型人工智能芯片将把 Gemini 架构的部分内容直接嵌入芯片中。

items.title_en: S&P 500 and Nasdaq are higher to start the week as U.S. oil wavers, chipmakers rise: Live updates
items.title_zh: 由于美国石油波动、芯片制造商上涨，标普 500 指数和纳斯达克指数本周开盘走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: Stocks rose Monday as oil prices fluctuated in response to the latest bout of military exchanges between the U.S. and Iran.
items.desc_zh: 由于油价因美国和伊朗之间最新一轮军事交锋而波动，股市周一上涨。

items.title_en: JPMorgan likes this missile and aircraft systems maker. Here's why
items.title_zh: 摩根大通喜欢这家导弹和飞机系统制造商。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: Moog is already up 61% in 2026, but it could see its stock trade even higher as its business gains more momentum across several industries, per JPMorgan.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通表示，到 2026 年，穆格的股价已上涨 61%，但随着其业务在多个行业获得更多动力，其股价可能会更高。

items.title_en: JetBlue wins Spirit slots at LaGuardia Airport, eyes move to Marine Air Terminal as airlines fight for space
items.title_zh: 捷蓝航空赢得精神航空在拉瓜迪亚机场的航班时刻，随着航空公司争夺空间，目光转向海军陆战队航空站
items.desc_en: JetBlue Airways won takeoff and landing slots for up to 12 roundtrip flights at LaGuardia Airport.
items.desc_zh: 捷蓝航空赢得了拉瓜迪亚机场多达 12 个往返航班的起降时刻。

items.title_en: Ten killed as Russian attacks on merchant ships in Black Sea intensify
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯加强对黑海商船的袭击造成十人死亡
items.desc_en: Russian strikes on the Odesa region have killed 28 people in July alone, local authorities say.
items.desc_zh: 地方当局称，仅 7 月份，俄罗斯对敖德萨地区的袭击就造成 28 人死亡。

items.title_en: AMD launches Helios, its first rack AI system to rival Nvidia, adding Microsoft as newest buyer
items.title_zh: AMD 推出 Helios，这是首款与 Nvidia 竞争的机架式 AI 系统，微软成为最新买家
items.desc_en: AMD is taking aim at Nvidia with Helios, its first AI rack system, and has landed Microsoft as a new customer, joining Meta, OpenAI and Oracle.
items.desc_zh: AMD 正在通过其首款 AI 机架系统 Helios 瞄准 Nvidia，并已将微软纳入 Meta、OpenAI 和 Oracle 的行列，成为新客户。

items.title_en: Hamas names Khalil al-Hayya as new overall leader
items.title_zh: 哈马斯任命哈利勒·哈亚为新任总领导人
items.desc_en: The Palestinian armed group's Qatar-based chief negotiator replaces Yahya Sinwar, who was killed by Israeli forces in Gaza in 2024.
items.desc_zh: 巴勒斯坦武装组织驻卡塔尔的首席谈判代表接替了 2024 年在加沙被以色列军队杀害的叶海亚·辛瓦尔 (Yahya Sinwar)。

items.title_en: AliExpress fined record €550m by EU for allowing sale of illegal goods
items.title_zh: 全球速卖通因允许销售非法商品而被欧盟罚款创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元
items.desc_en: The Chinese retailer allowed unsafe toys and counterfeit clothes to be sold on its site, says the EU.
items.desc_zh: 欧盟表示，这家中国零售商允许在其网站上销售不安全的玩具和假冒服装。

items.title_en: Lamine Yamal celebrates World Cup win with little brother who charmed fans
items.title_zh: 拉明·亚马尔与迷倒球迷的弟弟一起庆祝世界杯胜利
items.desc_en: The three-year-old brother of Yamal has been hailed one of Spain's World Cup breakout stars by fans
items.desc_zh: 亚马尔三岁弟弟被球迷誉为西班牙世界杯新星之一

items.title_en: Rare identical quadruplets born in Australia
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚诞生罕见同卵四胞胎
items.desc_en: The parents of the four naturally-conceived girls were taken by "immense surprise" with the pregnancy, the hospital said.
items.desc_zh: 医院表示，这四名自然受孕女孩的父母对怀孕感到“非常惊讶”。

items.title_en: Coinbase trading results may fall short of expectations, according to prediction markets
items.title_zh: 市场预测称Coinbase交易结果可能达不到预期
items.desc_en: Speculators think in the company's second quarter earnings report, it will show trading volume fell for a third consecutive quarter.
items.desc_zh: 投机者认为，在该公司第二季度财报中，将显示交易量连续第三个季度下降。

items.title_en: Police block thousands of 'cockroach' protesters marching on India's parliament
items.title_zh: 警方阻止数千名“蟑螂”抗议者向印度议会游行
items.desc_en: Some protesters demanding education reforms said they were injured in clashes with police who banned the march.
items.desc_zh: 一些要求教育改革的抗议者表示，他们在与禁止游行的警察发生冲突时受伤。

items.title_en: Utah firefighter and four family members killed in flash flooding
items.title_zh: 犹他州消防员和四名家庭成员在山洪中丧生
items.desc_en: A husband, wife and their three sons died - meaning that only a daughter who did not join the outing is still alive.
items.desc_zh: 丈夫、妻子和他们的三个儿子都去世了，这意味着只有一个没有参加郊游的女儿还活着。

items.title_en: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Apple, Tesla, Yeti, Harley-Davidson, Broadcom & more
items.title_zh: 以下是周一最重要的分析师电话会议：Nvidia、Apple、Tesla、Yeti、Harley-Davidson、Broadcom 等
items.desc_en: Here are Monday's biggest calls on Wall Street.
items.desc_zh: 以下是周一华尔街最重要的电话。

items.title_en: UK's Andy Burnham becomes PM as Trump slams Britain as 'Poverty Stricken Disaster'
items.title_zh: 英国安迪·伯纳姆出任首相，特朗普抨击英国是“贫困灾难”
items.desc_en: The prospect of Burnham, considered more left-leaning than Starmer, replacing the incumbent prime minister sent jitters through bond markets earlier this year.
items.desc_zh: 伯纳姆被认为比斯塔默更左倾，他取代现任总理的前景在今年早些时候引起了债券市场的不安。

items.title_en: Oil prices erase gains after Iran says U.S. talks could be pursued based on national interests
items.title_zh: 伊朗称美国可以基于国家利益进行谈判后油价回吐涨幅
items.desc_en: American forces have started ninth consecutive night of strikes against Iranian targets.
items.desc_zh: 美军已连续第九晚对伊朗目标发动袭击。

items.title_en: JD Vance says wife Usha and son 'happy and healthy' after birth of fourth child
items.title_zh: JD万斯说妻子乌莎和儿子在第四个孩子出生后“快乐又健康”
items.desc_en: The couple welcomed their fourth child, Alec Neel Vance, on Sunday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周日早上，这对夫妇迎来了​​他们的第四个孩子，亚历克·尼尔·万斯 (Alec Neel Vance)。

items.title_en: Trump says US strikes hit Iran in 'honour' of American soldiers killed
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国空袭伊朗是为了“纪念”阵亡美国士兵
items.desc_en: Iran responded with attacks in Syria and Jordan, as two ships reportedly exploded in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗以对叙利亚和约旦的袭击作为回应，据报道两艘船只在霍尔木兹海峡爆炸。

items.title_en: Voters wary of government ownership in companies as Trump administration takes equity stakes
items.title_zh: 由于特朗普政府持有股权，选民对政府对公司的所有权持谨慎态度
items.desc_en: About half of voters believe it isn't appropriate for the U.S. government to own stakes in companies, a new CNBC poll found.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的一项新民意调查发现，大约一半的选民认为美国政府持有公司股份是不合适的。

items.title_en: Ryanair profits drop as Iran war puts off passengers and lifts fuel costs
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争推迟了旅客出行并提高了燃油成本，瑞安航空利润下降
items.desc_en: The Irish airline said oil prices had increased costs meanwhile Brent crude surpassed $90.
items.desc_zh: 这家爱尔兰航空公司表示，油价增加了成本，同时布伦特原油价格突破了 90 美元。

items.title_en: Boy, 13, dies during World Cup celebrations in Spain
items.title_zh: 13岁男孩在西班牙世界杯庆祝活动中去世
items.desc_en: Two other young people were injured after a fountain partially collapsed in Salamanca's Ciudad Rodrigo.
items.desc_zh: 萨拉曼卡罗德里戈城一座喷泉部分倒塌，另外两名年轻人受伤。

items.title_en: Bezos backs CuspAI as startup teams up with Nvidia to hunt for chipmaking materials
items.title_zh: 贝索斯支持 CuspAI，初创公司与 Nvidia 合作寻找芯片制造材料
items.desc_en: CuspAI is part of a new wave of companies looking to use AI to solve challenges in the physical world.
items.desc_zh: CuspAI 是寻求利用人工智能解决现实世界挑战的新一波公司的一部分。

items.title_en: FIFA emerges as the $9 billion winner as the biggest, brashest World Cup ever draws to a close
items.title_zh: 有史以来规模最大、最激烈的世界杯即将落下帷幕，FIFA 成为 90 亿美元的赢家
items.desc_en: The football governing body presided over the most lucrative sporting event in history and is poised to net over $9 billion in revenue for 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该足球管理机构主办了历史上最赚钱的体育赛事，预计到 2026 年净收入将超过 90 亿美元。

items.title_en: Food delivery rider wins China's top literary prize
items.title_zh: 送餐骑手荣获中国最高文学奖
items.desc_en: Wang Jibing is among blue-collar Chinese workers gaining wider attention for their literary works.
items.desc_zh: 王吉兵是中国蓝领工人之一，因其文学作品而受到更广泛的关注。

items.title_en: Norway opens new memorial for victims of 2011 Breivik massacre
items.title_zh: 挪威为 2011 年布雷维克大屠杀受害者开设新纪念碑
items.desc_en: The artwork in the capital Oslo was unveiled on Sunday ahead of the 15th anniversary of the attack.
items.desc_zh: 这件艺术品于周日在袭击 15 周年纪念日之前在首都奥斯陆揭幕。

items.title_en: World Cup 2026 final in photos: Spain triumphs as football crowns a new champion
items.title_zh: 2026 年世界杯决赛照片：西班牙获胜，足球加冕新冠军
items.desc_en: Spain reclaimed football's biggest prize on Sunday, defeating Argentina 1-0 after extra time in a tense World Cup final.
items.desc_zh: 周日，西班牙队在紧张的世界杯决赛中通过加时赛以 1-0 击败阿根廷队，夺回了足球界的最高奖项。

items.title_en: Inkling
items.title_zh: Inkling
items.desc_en: Open weights 975B multimodal model built for fine-tuning
items.desc_zh: 开放式权重 975B 多模式模型，专为微调而打造

items.title_zh: Reignat
items.desc_en: Privacy-friendly web analytics with realtime AI insights
items.desc_zh: 具有实时人工智能见解的隐私友好型网络分析

items.title_zh: Autoplot
items.desc_en: Unify data analysis and plotting in one powerful workspace
items.desc_zh: 将数据分析和绘图统一在一个强大的工作区中

items.title_en: Kogvio
items.title_zh: Kogvio
items.desc_en: Understand anything online without leaving the page.
items.desc_zh: 无需离开页面即可了解在线任何内容。

items.title_zh: Backbeat Forge
items.desc_en: Turn drum audio into a score you can actually edit
items.desc_zh: 将鼓音频转换为您可以实际编辑的乐谱

items.title_en: Creed
items.title_zh: Creed
items.desc_en: Your personal context file for every agent.
items.desc_zh: 每个代理的个人上下文文件。

items.title_en: Ferry carrying 116 passengers sinks off Guyana coast, authorities say
items.title_zh: 当局称载有116名乘客的渡轮在圭亚那海岸沉没
items.desc_en: Eight passengers have so far been rescued after the vessel capsized between Georgetown and Port Kaituma.
items.desc_zh: 乔治敦和凯图马港之间的船只倾覆后，迄今为止已有八名乘客获救。

items.title_en: US and Iran exchange strikes after two US soldiers killed in Jordan
items.title_zh: 两名美国士兵在约旦丧生后，美国和伊朗进行了交锋
items.desc_en: US forces target Iranian sites for the eighth night in a row, while Iran says it fired drones at the US military in Kuwait.
items.desc_zh: 美军连续第八个晚上瞄准伊朗目标，而伊朗表示，它向驻科威特的美军发射了无人机。

items.title_en: CaptureKit
items.title_zh: CaptureKit
items.desc_en: Keep your desktop clean by auto-organizing screenshots.
items.desc_zh: 通过自动组织屏幕截图保持桌面干净。

items.title_en: World Cup audience stayed bipartisan despite Trump's prominent role, CNBC survey finds
items.title_zh: CNBC 调查发现，尽管特朗普扮演重要角色，世界杯观众仍保持两党一致
items.desc_en: Nearly half of registered voters watched the 2026 World Cup, with income and education shaping viewership more than party affiliation, the survey found.
items.desc_zh: 调查发现，近一半的登记选民观看了 2026 年世界杯，收入和教育程度对收视率的影响大于党派归属。

items.title_en: Scriptyard
items.title_zh: Scriptyard
items.desc_en: A free visual story development workspace
items.desc_zh: 免费的视觉故事开发工作区

items.title_en: China's Moonshot AI claims Kimi K3 can rival OpenAI and Anthropic
items.title_zh: 中国的Moonshot AI声称Kimi K3可以与OpenAI和Anthropic相媲美
items.desc_en: The company has unveiled a massive new artificial intelligence model it says can take on top American firms.
items.desc_zh: 该公司推出了一个大规模的新人工智能模型，据称可以与美国顶尖公司抗衡。

items.title_en: LnkFlow
items.title_zh: LnkFlow
items.desc_en: Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business
items.desc_zh: 代理点击跟踪可显示您的业务增长因素

items.title_zh: BlockscopeChat
items.desc_en: AI Crypto Investigations/Research Agents
items.desc_zh: AI 加密货币调查/研究代理

items.title_zh: Deck
items.desc_en: The most capable AI assistant with its own inbox
items.desc_zh: 最强大的人工智能助手，拥有自己的收件箱

items.title_zh: Lunen.ai
items.desc_en: Build AI agents your whole team can run, and control
items.desc_zh: 构建整个团队都可以运行和控制的人工智能代理

items.title_en: Trump Media to sell early access to key social posts
items.title_zh: 特朗普媒体将出售对关键社交帖子的早期访问权
items.desc_en: Trump Media is launching a fast, paid feed of the its social posts for Wall Street traders.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普媒体正在为华尔街交易员推出快速、付费的社交帖子。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: LayerProof Mylar
items.title_zh: LayerProof Mylar
items.desc_en: Create launch-ready motion videos for your products
items.desc_zh: 为您的产品创建准备发布的动态视频

items.title_en: SpaceX share price drops below stock market debut
items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价
items.desc_en: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_en: Backdrop
items.title_zh: Backdrop
items.desc_en: AI Coworkers that run your projects and operations
items.desc_zh: 运行您的项目和运营的 AI 同事

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.title_en: NeuroVidz
items.title_zh: NeuroVidz
items.desc_en: See how a brain reacts to your clip
items.desc_zh: 看看大脑对您的剪辑有何反应

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Surgeons remotely control two human-like robots in an operating theatre.
items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.title_en: Skippr AI
items.title_zh: Skippr AI
items.desc_en: The live AI employee inside your product, serving every user
items.desc_zh: 产品中的实时人工智能员工为每个用户提供服务

items.title_en: Loova Ads Studio
items.title_zh: Loova Ads Studio
items.desc_en: Create AI ads that convert, not just look good
items.desc_zh: 制作能够转化的 AI 广告，而不仅仅是看起来不错

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Nautis
items.title_zh: Nautis
items.desc_en: The AI-native Operating System for founders.
items.desc_zh: 为创始人打造的人工智能原生操作系统。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_zh: 科技生活

items.desc_zh: 屏幕时间对年幼的孩子有影响。

items.desc_zh: 重播 QA 会在用户发现问题之前告诉您哪些问题被破坏了
